summary: Comprehensive testing of Groove Media landing page completed. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success). Frontend loads well with some form interaction issues identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Service dropdown has visibility/interaction issues preventing selection on both desktop and mobile
Submit button click is intercepted by overlay elements preventing form submission

integration_issues.issue: Form cannot be submitted due to overlay interception issues - prevents lead capture

passed_tests: Backend API health check (100% success rate)
Landing page loading and sections display
Live status indicator with pulse animation
Form field input (name, business, phone, email, website)

success_percentage.frontend: 70% - Core functionality works but form submission blocked

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix form submission overlay issues. The submit button and service dropdown are being intercepted by overlay elements preventing users from completing lead capture. This blocks the primary business function. Check z-index values and modal/overlay conflicts in LeadFormSection component.
